content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_LWD_TV_CAMPAIGN]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO



CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_LWD_TV_CAMPAIGN]
(	[TV_CAMPAIGN_ID] 		BIGINT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[spot_id] 				BIGINT NULL,
	[Client] 				[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Product] 				[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Promotion] 			[nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[MediaType] 			[nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[Station] 				[nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[MediaCode] 			[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Length] 				BIGINT NULL,
	[WeekOf] 				DATE NULL,
	[Date] 					DATE NULL,
	[Time] 					[nvarchar](32) NULL,
	[Spot] 					BIGINT NULL,
	[Rate] 					BIGINT NULL,
	[RateAdj] 				[DECIMAL](16,2) NULL,
	[RenuityHome_UA_visits] [DECIMAL](16,2) NULL,
	[RenuityHome_3_Vanity_Sites_DA_visits] 			BIGINT NULL,
	[StatewideNow_UA_visits] 						[DECIMAL](16,2) NULL,
	[StatewideNow_1_Vanity_Site_DA_visits] 			BIGINT NULL,
	[Web_Leads_AppointmentSet] 						BIGINT NULL,
	[Web_Leads_NetSet] 								BIGINT NULL,
	[Web_Leads_Sold] 								BIGINT NULL,
	[Calls_visits] 									BIGINT NULL,
	[Calls_Qualified_Call] 							BIGINT NULL,
	[Call_Leads_AppointmentSet] 					BIGINT NULL,
	[Call_Leads_NetSet] 							BIGINT NULL,
	[Call_Leads_Sold] 		BIGINT NULL,
	[Efficiency] 			[nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[ProgramName] 			[nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[TVHHImp] 				[DECIMAL](16,5) NULL,
	[TVHHRating] 			[DECIMAL](16,13) NULL,
	[DemoImp] 				[DECIMAL](16,5) NULL,
	[DemoRating] 			[DECIMAL](16,13) NULL,
	[RecordNo_Spot] 		BIGINT NULL,
	[Phone] 				[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Market] 				[nvarchar](128) NULL,
	[BroadcastName] 		[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[drag_pass_name] 		[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Contract_Phone] 		[nvarchar](64) NULL,
	[Division] 				[nvarchar](32) NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	HEAP
);
